case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO BUREAU OF VS DELEON BENJAMIN L.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $418.69 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO BUREAU OF DELINQUENT REVENUE AS TO DEFENDANT DELEON BENJAMIN L. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-05-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 03

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO BUREAU OF DELINQUENT REVENUE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DELEON BENJAMIN L. $418.69 PRINCIPAL, $39.79 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $458.48, CIVIL CODE SECTION 1917 DAMAGES INCLUDED STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT DELEON BENJAMIN L.
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DELEON BENJAMIN L.
